name: @playwright/test
purpose: Browser automation and smoke testing for boot, canvas rendering, input, viewport behavior, screenshots, and browser QA.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view @playwright/test version license repository.url time --json` reported license `Apache-2.0` and repository `git+https://github.com/microsoft/playwright.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: Playwright is the selected browser QA tool in PLAN.md and AGENTS.md and is Microsoft-maintained browser automation tooling.
